response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title "スパークル" (Sparkle) from on-screen text and identified performers Murasaki Shion and Minato Aqua via the hashtag #紫咲シオン卒業LIVE.
2. Performed web search: "Sparkle" RADWIMPS Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Confirmed song is "Sparkle" by RADWIMPS.
4. Compiled JSON with the identified song and performer information, and provided a representative portion of the full lyrics in Japanese and English.
response.global_summary: A live duet performance of the song "Sparkle" (originally by RADWIMPS) by Hololive virtual YouTubers Murasaki Shion and Minato Aqua, taken from the "#MurasakiShionGraduationLIVE" event.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion and Minato Aqua perform a duet of "Sparkle" on a virtual stage. The video contains the song throughout.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Mada kono sekai wa boku wo kainarashitetai mitai da
Nozomi doori ii darou utsukushiku mogaku yo
Tagai no sunadokei nagame nagara kisu wo shiyou yo
"Sayonara" kara ichiban tooi basho de machiawase wo shiyou
Tsui ni ai made jikan to iu chiba no ushiro kara
... (Lyrics continue)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It seems like this world still wants to keep me on a close leash.
Is that just as you wished? I'll struggle beautifully.
While gazing at each other's hourglasses, let's share a kiss.
"So long," it's a bit too much, isn't it?
Even if we are separated,
I'll still look for your light in this world.
From a thousand years ago,
I'll continue to look for you from today.
... (Lyrics continue)
